data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for fast retrieval for session playback/review.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for fast retrieval for session playback/review. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for fast retrieval, but without specific evidence demonstrating that this functionality exists, the validation cannot be completed, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of fast retrieval mechanisms for session playback/review.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the fast retrieval requirement.
